code:
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read().split()
    N = int(input[0])
    D = int(input[1])
    P = int(input[2])
    F = list(map(int, input[3:3+N]))
    
    F.sort(reverse=True)
    
    total = 0
    i = 0
    while i < N:
        j = i + D
        chunk = F[i:j]
        sum_chunk = sum(chunk)
        if P < sum_chunk:
            total += P
        else:
            total += sum_chunk
        i = j
    
    print(total)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
